Bash(bench --site site1.local mariadb -N -e "SELECT voucher_no, account, ROUND\(debit,2\), ROUND\(credit,2\), docstatus, is_cancelled, posting_date FROM \\`tabGeneral Ledger Entry\\` ORDER BY creation DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(bench --site site1.local execute frappe.db.sql --kwargs '{"query":"SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM `tabGeneral Ledger Entry` WHERE is_cancelled IS NULL","as_dict":true}')

Bash(bench --site site1.local execute frappe.db.sql --kwargs '{"query": "SELECT voucher_no, voucher_type, company, posting_date, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM `tabGeneral Ledger Entry` WHERE is_cancelled=0 GROUP BY voucher_no, voucher_type ORDER BY posting_date DESC LIMIT 5", "as_dict": true}')

Bash(bench --site site1.local execute frappe.db.sql --kwargs "{'query': \\"SELECT tax_type, tax_amount, account_head, parent FROM \\`tabTax Line\\` WHERE parenttype='Sales Invoice' LIMIT 10\\", 'as_dict': True}")

Bash(bench --site site1.local execute frappe.db.sql --kwargs "{'query': \\"SELECT tl.tax_type, tl.account_head, tl.tax_amount, tl.parent, tl.parenttype, si.docstatus FROM \\`tabTax Line\\` tl LEFT JOIN \\`tabSales Invoice\\` si ON si.name=tl.parent WHERE tl.parenttype='Sales Invoice' AND si.docstatus=1 LIMIT 10\\", 'as_dict': True}")

Bash(bench --site site1.local execute frappe.db.sql --kwargs "{'query': \\"SELECT voucher_type, voucher_no, SUM\(debit\) AS dr, SUM\(credit\) AS cr FROM \\`tabGeneral Ledger Entry\\` WHERE company='Eiffele gaming' AND is_cancelled=0 AND account IN \(SELECT name FROM \\`tabAccount\\` WHERE account_type='Receivable'\) GROUP BY voucher_no, voucher_type ORDER BY posting_date\\", 'as_dict': True}")
Bash(bench --site site1.local mariadb -e "SELECT name FROM \\`tabCustomer\\` LIMIT 3;")
